title: [EN] Pictet — kept integrated, manages the three-way trade-off

description.en: Geneva-based, the largest Swiss private bank. 200 years old. Chose NOT to unbundle — develops deep customer relationships, handles transactions in-house, and designs its own financial products. Has to consciously manage trade-offs between three fundamentally different businesses.
description.zh: 总部日内瓦的最大瑞士私人银行,200 年历史。选择不解绑 —— 自身经营深度客户关系、内部处理交易、自己设计金融产品。必须有意识地管理三种根本不同业务之间的内生冲突。
